rationale: Image nearest the dots-class median Dice score; demonstrates the dots-to-Voronoi route.
Image nearest the lines-class median Dice score; demonstrates the lines-to-ColorWheel route.
Image nearest the mixed-class median Dice score; demonstrates execution of both downstream modules.
Image nearest the irregular-class median Dice score; demonstrates intentional termination after segmentation.
Lowest segmentation score in the validation set; demonstrates propagation of severe under-segmentation into downstream analysis.
High-confidence line-to-irregular classification error; demonstrates how classification error suppresses the expected ColorWheel route.
